block_02: Journal your way to the top
block_03: There is no one strategy that guarantees 100% success. However, you may improve your chances of getting great results just by staying consistent.
block_04: Creating a plan and sticking to it most of the time can help you stay focused and achieve your goals faster. How to do this? The answer is simple: keep a trading journal.
block_05: Sounds boring? Not necessarily! You can make it fun by testing different formats and approaches. Get some tips on including the trading journal in your routine in this material.
block_09: I want to trade on Forex, but don’t know which strategy to use. Any tips?
block_12: What works for some traders may not work for others. So you might need to try out a few approaches before choosing the optimal one for you. Check out this article with 3 popular Forex trading strategies and learn about the pros and cons of each one.
